name: Sesame Beef Strips
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Rice wine or dry sherry
1 package (16 oz) frozen Oriental Vegetables, Cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Partially freeze the steak to firm it.
2. Slice the steak diagonally across the grain into 1/4-inch strips.
3. Combine green onions, soy sauce, sesame seeds, rice wine, and sugar in a plastic bag or utility dish. Stir to coat.
4. Place beef strips and marinade in a sealed plastic bag or covered dish. Let stand for 30 minutes in the refrigerator.
5. Remove beef from marinade; reserve the marinade.
6. Thread beef strips loosely (weaving back and forth) onto eight bamboo skewers (9 to 10 inches long).
7. Arrange skewers, not touching each other, in a 1 1/2 quart rectangular microwave baking dish. Brush with reserved marinade and cover with waxed paper.
8. Microwave on high for 4 minutes.
9. Rearrange the skewers, then continue microwaving for 1 minute or until beef is slightly pink (do not overcook).
10. Let stand covered for 2 minutes before serving. Serve the skewered beef strips on a bed of cooked Oriental vegetables, garnished with cherry tomatoes and parsley. Makes 4 servings.
